title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Milkbasket Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Milkbasket Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Milkbasket Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Milkbasket Ventures Solutions:
Milkbasket Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milkbasket Ventures Solutions!
